title: Create a crisis session with required fields only (default callsign and duration)
description: Verifies a user can submit a valid crisis description and reach the war room after the assembling phase using default settings.

steps.description: Verify text "Describe your crisis. Anything. Real or fictional." is visible
Type "A major cyberattack has shut down the national power grid; hospitals and water systems are failing." into the large crisis description textarea
Verify text "Assembling your crisis team..." is visible

title: Crisis text under 10 characters keeps Assemble Team disabled, then enables at 10+
description: Verifies minimum length validation blocks submission until the crisis description reaches at least 10 characters.

steps.description: Type "Too short" into the large crisis description textarea
Type "Too short but now long enough" into the large crisis description textarea
Verify text "Assembling your crisis team..." is visible

title: Set a custom Chairman Callsign before assembling the team
description: Verifies the chairman callsign can be changed from the default and the session still assembles and navigates to the war room.

steps.description: Type "A fast-moving wildfire is approaching a major metropolitan area; evacuations are stalled and air quality is hazardous." into the large crisis description textarea
Verify text "Assembling your crisis team..." is visible

title: Adjust Session Duration slider before assembling the team
description: Verifies the session duration can be adjusted via the slider and the session still assembles successfully.

steps.description: Type "A coastal city is under imminent threat from a tsunami after a major offshore earthquake; communications are intermittent." into the large crisis description textarea
Click on the Session Duration slider track near the right side to increase the duration
Verify text "Assembling your crisis team..." is visible

title: Optional intel upload is not required to assemble (skip upload)
description: Verifies a user can assemble a session without uploading any intel and still reach the war room.

steps.description: Type "A ransomware outbreak is spreading through municipal systems; emergency services dispatch is degraded and public safety is at risk." into the large crisis description textarea
Verify text "Assembling your crisis team..." is visible

title: Form fields appear only after reaching the minimum crisis description length
description: Verifies progressive disclosure: chairman callsign and duration controls appear only after 10+ characters in the crisis description.

steps.description: Verify element "Chairman Callsign" is not visible
Type "123456789" into the large crisis description textarea
Verify element "Chairman Callsign" is not visible
Type "0" into the large crisis description textarea

title: Submitting with whitespace-only or effectively empty text does not proceed
description: Verifies the user cannot submit a session with non-meaningful input (e.g., spaces) and does not navigate away from the landing page.

steps.description: Type "          " into the large crisis description textarea
Type "Meaningful crisis text now provided." into the large crisis description textarea
Verify text "Assembling your crisis team..." is visible

title: View agent roster cards in AGENTS tab with required fields
description: Verifies the left AGENTS panel shows agent cards with name, role, status, and trust score once the war room finishes assembling.

steps.description: Type "Regional power grid failure with civil unrest and misinformation" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session

title: Open Agent Details Overlay from a roster card
description: Verifies selecting an agent card opens the Agent Details Overlay.

steps.description: Type "Airport cyberattack causing flight delays and cascading supply chain issues" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Wait for element "Agent" to be visible
Click the first visible agent card in the roster list
Verify element "Agent Details" overlay is visible

title: Agent Details Overlay shows identity and role information
description: Verifies the Agent Details Overlay displays the selected agent's character name and role title.

steps.description: Type "Earthquake response with hospital overload and fuel shortages" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Click the first visible agent card in the roster list
Verify element "Agent Details" overlay is visible

title: Agent Details Overlay shows trust score as a percentage
description: Verifies the trust score appears in the Agent Details Overlay in percent format.

steps.description: Type "Major water contamination incident affecting multiple cities" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Click the first visible agent card in the roster list
Verify element "Agent Details" overlay is visible

title: Agent Details Overlay shows public positions section
description: Verifies the overlay includes a visible section for the agent's public positions/recent positions.

steps.description: Type "Coastal hurricane evacuation with shelter shortages and traffic gridlock" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Click the first visible agent card in the roster list
Verify element "Agent Details" overlay is visible

title: Roster supports progressive reveal during assembling
description: Verifies that while assembling is in progress, the UI shows a loading/briefing state and agent roster content appears progressively when available.

steps.description: Type "Nationwide rail strike escalating into supply shortages and protests" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Wait for element "agent card" to be visible

title: Agent status label appears on roster (IDLE/SPEAKING/THINKING)
description: Verifies the roster shows a visible status label for agents and that at least one of the expected status words appears.

steps.description: Type "Diplomatic crisis with rapid escalation and conflicting intelligence reports" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Wait for element "agent card" to be visible

title: Switching selected agent updates the Agent Details Overlay content
description: Verifies clicking a different agent updates the overlay to show the newly selected agent's information.

steps.description: Type "Financial market shock with bank runs and coordinated disinformation" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Click the first visible agent card in the roster list
Verify element "Agent Details" overlay is visible
Click a different visible agent card in the roster list
Verify element "Agent Details" overlay is visible

title: Summon Agent: successfully generate a new agent and see it added to the roster
description: Verifies a chairman can summon a new agent, observe the generating state, and eventually see the new agent in the agent roster.

steps.description: Fill "Crisis" (or primary crisis description) text area with "Regional power grid outage following coordinated cyberattack; need rapid incident response."
Click the primary "Create" / "Start" / "Enter War Room" button on the landing page
Verify text "+ SUMMON AGENT" is visible
Click the "+ SUMMON AGENT" button at the bottom of the agent panel
Type "Cybersecurity Expert" into the role description input field

title: Summon Agent: modal opens and can be cancelled without creating an agent
description: Verifies the summon modal can be opened and dismissed, returning to the war room without generating an agent.

steps.description: Fill "Crisis" (or primary crisis description) text area with "Major flood event impacting multiple counties; coordinate rescue and logistics."
Click the primary "Create" / "Start" / "Enter War Room" button on the landing page
Verify text "+ SUMMON AGENT" is visible
Click the "+ SUMMON AGENT" button at the bottom of the agent panel
Verify element "Summon Agent" modal is visible
Click the "Cancel" button in the summon modal
Verify text "+ SUMMON AGENT" is visible

title: Summon Agent: prevent summoning when role description is empty
description: Verifies the user cannot submit the summon request with an empty role description and receives an inline validation message or disabled submit behavior.

steps.description: Fill "Crisis" (or primary crisis description) text area with "Airport systems outage affecting flights and security; need rapid coordination."
Click the primary "Create" / "Start" / "Enter War Room" button on the landing page
Verify text "+ SUMMON AGENT" is visible
Click the "+ SUMMON AGENT" button at the bottom of the agent panel
Verify element "Summon Agent" modal is visible

title: Summon Agent: long role description is accepted and does not break the modal UI
description: Verifies a longer, detailed role description can be entered and submitted, showing the generating state (and eventual roster addition if it completes).

steps.description: Fill "Crisis" (or primary crisis description) text area with "Major wildfire approaching populated areas; coordinate response across agencies."
Click the primary "Create" / "Start" / "Enter War Room" button on the landing page
Verify text "+ SUMMON AGENT" is visible
Click the "+ SUMMON AGENT" button at the bottom of the agent panel
Type "Senior Incident Response Strategist specializing in multi-agency wildfire coordination, evacuation planning, and public safety communications" into the role description input field

title: End session successfully and exit back to landing page
description: Verifies the chairman can end a session, see termination UI states, and exit to the landing page.

steps.description: Type "Test crisis for end-session happy path" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Click the red "END SESSION" button in the top command bar
Verify text "CONFIRM? YES / NO" is visible

title: Termination overlay appears after confirming end session
description: Verifies the terminating progress overlay is shown immediately after confirming session end.

steps.description: Type "Test crisis for termination overlay" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Click the red "END SESSION" button in the top command bar
Verify text "CONFIRM? YES / NO" is visible

title: Exit Room from terminated modal returns to landing page
description: Verifies the EXIT ROOM button on the SESSION TERMINATED modal returns the user to the landing page.

steps.description: Type "Test crisis for exit room" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Click the red "END SESSION" button in the top command bar

title: Cancel end session from confirmation prompt (choose NO)
description: Verifies choosing NO on the confirmation prompt does not terminate the session and the war room remains usable.

steps.description: Type "Test crisis for cancel end session" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Click the red "END SESSION" button in the top command bar
Verify text "CONFIRM? YES / NO" is visible

title: Dismiss end-session confirmation prompt via Escape key
description: Verifies the confirmation prompt can be dismissed with Escape and the session continues.

steps.description: Type "Test crisis for escape dismiss" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Click the red "END SESSION" button in the top command bar
Verify text "CONFIRM? YES / NO" is visible

title: Crisis Board shows core sections after a session is assembled
description: Verifies the Crisis Board center panel loads and shows the main sections for decisions, conflicts, and intel in an active war room session.

steps.description: Type "City-wide chemical spill near central station with rising panic" into the crisis description field
Wait for text "War Room" to be visible

title: Crisis Board shows CRITICAL INTEL section in the center panel
description: Verifies the Crisis Board includes the CRITICAL INTEL section and it is visible once the war room loads.

steps.description: Type "Coordinated cyberattack on hospital network causing system outages" into the crisis description field
Wait for text "War Room" to be visible

title: Agreed decisions entries show a visible timestamp format
description: Verifies at least one agreed decision entry displays a timestamp indicator in the Crisis Board.

steps.description: Type "Major bridge collapse with multiple vehicles and suspected hazardous cargo" into the crisis description field
Wait for text "War Room" to be visible
Scroll to the "AGREED DECISIONS" section in the Crisis Board

title: Open conflicts section is present and lists conflicts when available
description: Verifies the Open Conflicts section exists and can display conflict items between agents when present.

steps.description: Type "Rapidly spreading wildfire approaching suburbs with conflicting evacuation reports" into the crisis description field
Wait for text "War Room" to be visible
Scroll to the "OPEN CONFLICTS" section in the Crisis Board
Verify element "OPEN CONFLICTS list" is visible

title: Critical intel section is present and lists intel items when available
description: Verifies the Critical Intel section exists and can display intel items produced by the simulation.

steps.description: Type "Unidentified drone swarm over downtown with uncertain intent" into the crisis description field
Wait for text "War Room" to be visible
Scroll to the "CRITICAL INTEL" section in the Crisis Board
Verify element "CRITICAL INTEL list" is visible

title: Crisis Board supports expanding an item if details view is available
description: Verifies that clicking a decision or intel item opens a details view when the UI supports expansion.

steps.description: Type "Airport security incident with suspected coordinated threat" into the crisis description field
Wait for text "War Room" to be visible
Click the first visible item under "AGREED DECISIONS"

title: Crisis Board shows a synchronization/loading state during delayed data
description: Verifies the Crisis Board presents a loading/synchronizing message when the feed/board data is delayed or reconnecting.

steps.description: Type "Severe flooding with communications outages and intermittent connectivity" into the crisis description field
Wait for text "War Room" to be visible

title: Crisis Board offers historical replay controls when data is being synchronized
description: Verifies that when the session indicates delayed events, the Crisis Board provides a visible replay/history control.

steps.description: Type "Earthquake aftermath with aftershocks and delayed situation reports" into the crisis description field
Wait for text "War Room" to be visible

title: Crisis Feed displays existing feed items with timestamps, source names, and content
description: Verifies the Crisis Feed is visible in the war room and shows readable feed items including timestamp, source, and message text.

steps.description: Fill "Severe coastal flooding with power outages" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Verify element "Feed item timestamp" is visible
Verify element "Feed item source/agent name" is visible
Verify element "Feed item message text" is visible

title: Crisis Feed is positioned in the bottom-left and remains visible in the war room
description: Verifies the Crisis Feed panel is visible in the bottom-left area of the war room UI and labeled correctly.

steps.description: Fill "Airport security incident with unclear threat level" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Verify element "Feed panel container" is visible

title: New feed items appear at the top of the Crisis Feed during the simulation
description: Verifies that newly arriving feed items show up at the top of the feed list (most recent first).

steps.description: Fill "Cyberattack on hospital network causing system outages" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Verify element "Top feed item" is visible
Verify element "Top feed item" is visible
Verify element "Second feed item" is visible

title: Crisis Feed supports scrolling to view older items
description: Verifies the feed list can be scrolled to reveal older items below the initial view.

steps.description: Fill "Earthquake with aftershocks affecting urban infrastructure" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Scroll to the bottom of the Crisis Feed list
Verify element "Older feed item" is visible
Scroll to the top of the Crisis Feed list
Verify element "Top feed item" is visible

title: Crisis Feed shows system and agent-sourced messages distinctly (by visible source label)
description: Verifies feed items include a visible source label that can represent agents and system messages.

steps.description: Fill "Wildfire spreading near multiple residential zones" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Verify element "Feed item message text" is visible

title: Crisis Feed remains usable while items continue to arrive (no visual disappearance of the panel)
description: Verifies the feed panel stays visible and readable over time as the simulation continues to post new items.

steps.description: Fill "Chemical spill near a river impacting drinking water supply" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Verify element "Feed item message text" is visible

title: Create a new session and verify Agent Voice Pods area is visible in the war room
description: Ensures a user can start from the landing page, create a session, wait for bootstrapping, and see the bottom-center agent voice pods area.

steps.description: Type "Test crisis: coordinated cyberattack impacting hospital systems" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Wait for the war room screen to load
Verify element "Agent voice pods" is visible

title: Verify agent pods display visible status labels (thinking/speaking/idle)
description: Validates that at least one pod shows a visible status and that pod statuses are rendered in the bottom-center pods area.

steps.description: Type "Test crisis: earthquake with cascading infrastructure failures" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Wait for the war room screen to load
Verify element "Agent voice pods" is visible

title: Open a pod and verify detailed pod view shows transcript snippets and trust score
description: Ensures a user can click a pod to open its details and see recent transcript snippets and a trust score.

steps.description: Type "Test crisis: chemical spill near residential area; need coordinated response" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Wait for the war room screen to load
Verify element "Agent voice pods" is visible
Click on the first visible agent pod

title: Verify pod detail view shows multiple recent transcript snippets when opened
description: Checks that the detailed pod view provides more than one visible transcript snippet item when available.

steps.description: Type "Test crisis: wildfire evacuation coordination across multiple counties" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Wait for the war room screen to load
Wait for agents to begin generating dialogue
Click on a visible agent pod

title: Verify clicking a pod while it is speaking still opens the detailed view
description: Ensures the pod remains interactive during speaking state and the detailed pod view can be opened without breaking UI.

steps.description: Type "Test crisis: major transit outage affecting emergency services response times" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Wait for the war room screen to load
Wait for text "speaking" to be visible on any agent pod
Click on the agent pod showing "speaking"

title: Verify chairman transcript appears and is routed to the intended agent in the pod detail view (if available)
description: Validates that after an interrupt, the chairman transcript is visible and associated with the correct agent in the detailed pod view.

steps.description: Type "Test crisis: ransomware attack on municipal services; prioritize containment and communications" into the crisis description field
Click the button to create/start the session
Wait for the war room screen to load
Wait for text "interrupted" to be visible on a pod

title: Right panel shows core intelligence stats after war room loads
description: Verifies the right sidebar renders the main intelligence stat tiles once the war room session finishes assembling.

steps.description: Type "E2E test crisis: right panel stats" into the crisis description field
Click on the button to create/start the session

title: Right panel shows all expected intelligence stat labels
description: Verifies all stat labels in the intelligence summary are present: Agents Active, Conflicts Open, Decisions Locked, Intel Items, Session Health.

steps.description: Type "E2E test crisis: all stat labels" into the crisis description field
Click on the button to create/start the session

title: Agent Trust Scores render as percentages
description: Verifies the Agent Trust Scores section displays percentage values for agents in the right panel.

steps.description: Type "E2E test crisis: trust scores" into the crisis description field
Click on the button to create/start the session
Verify element "Agent Trust Scores" is visible

title: Crisis Posture axes are visible in the right panel
description: Verifies Crisis Posture section renders the three axes labels in the right sidebar.

steps.description: Type "E2E test crisis: posture axes" into the crisis description field
Click on the button to create/start the session

title: Resolution Score with trend and contributors is visible
description: Verifies the Resolution Score section appears with trend context and contributor list/labels.

steps.description: Type "E2E test crisis: resolution score" into the crisis description field
Click on the button to create/start the session

title: Intelligence data loading shows skeleton placeholders before values appear
description: Verifies skeleton placeholders appear for intelligence sections during initial load and that values/sections render afterward.

steps.description: Type "E2E test crisis: skeletons" into the crisis description field
Click on the button to create/start the session

title: Retry control appears when intelligence fails to load
description: Verifies an on-screen retry control is presented when the intelligence sections fail to load.

steps.description: Type "E2E test crisis: retry control" into the crisis description field
Click on the button to create/start the session

title: Top command bar displays core status elements in an active war room session
description: Verifies the top command bar shows crisis title, UTC time, mic/LIVE indicators, threat level badge, and countdown timer.

steps.description: Fill a crisis description into the crisis input field
Click the button to create/start the session
Verify element "Top Command Bar" is visible

title: Crisis title can be expanded to show details from the top command bar
description: Verifies clicking the crisis title expands and shows additional details (domain and brief) in the top bar area.

steps.description: Fill a crisis description into the crisis input field
Click the button to create/start the session
Verify element "Top Command Bar" is visible
Click on the crisis title in the top command bar

title: Mic status indicator and LIVE badge are visible together in the top command bar
description: Verifies mic status (ACTIVE/MUTED) is displayed and the LIVE indicator is present in the command bar.

steps.description: Fill a crisis description into the crisis input field
Click the button to create/start the session
Verify element "Top Command Bar" is visible

title: Threat level badge shows one of the supported levels
description: Verifies the threat level badge is visible and displays a supported label (CONTAINED/ELEVATED/CRITICAL/MELTDOWN).

steps.description: Fill a crisis description into the crisis input field
Click the button to create/start the session

title: UPDATE DOCUMENT is disabled or unavailable while required draft sections are incomplete
description: Verifies clicking UPDATE DOCUMENT during processing shows it is unavailable (disabled state or tooltip message).

steps.description: Fill a crisis description into the crisis input field
Click the button to create/start the session
Verify element "Top Command Bar" is visible
Verify text "Unavailable until draft sections complete" is visible

title: END SESSION terminates the current session from the top command bar
description: Verifies END SESSION ends the war room session and transitions to an ended state or exits the war room UI.

steps.description: Fill a crisis description into the crisis input field
Click the button to create/start the session
